title: Safari Vibes

description.text: The Bahamas surely is a slice of paradise..but it does not have everything! The fabulous fauna and flora of the African Savannah for example — and we were able to bring those in, in this fresh and cheerful design with a very considered colour palette.
Zebra, Giraffe, leopard, cheetahs, Dung beetles and even an Elephant…if you can find it…all framed with a beautiful pattern inspired by west African wall art.

location: Children's Room. Private Home. Nassau, Bahamas
